name: BackWPup Helper
author: Sandy Figueroa

sections.description: Developer/testing utilities to simplify BackWPup testing and development. Adds an admin-topbar entry to manage BackWPup backup folders and toggle the 'Big backup' state for testing workflows.
sections.changelog:
1.2.0

  • Added minimal external updater support and manifest validation.

1.1.3

  • Bug fixes and robustness improvements to WP-CLI toggles.
  • Frontend: deterministic change indicator, localStorage persistence, stacked toasts.

description: Developer/testing utilities to simplify BackWPup testing and development.
changelog:
1.2.0 - Added minimal external updater support and manifest validation.
1.1.3 - Bug fixes and robustness improvements.
notes: Manifest includes required fields for BWH_Updater: version and download_url. Ensure manifest is served via HTTPS and that the manifest host matches the download_url host or is allowed by the updater.
